detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SPARTA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SPARTA.sol#667-807):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SPARTA.sol#741)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SPARTA.sol#821-833)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SPARTA.sol#747)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (SPARTA.sol#841)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (SPARTA.sol#843)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SPARTA.sol#803)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SPARTA.sol#971)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SPARTA.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SPARTA.sol#953)
	SPARTA._rOwned (SPARTA.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SPARTA._takeTeam(uint256) (SPARTA.sol#965-973)
	- SPARTA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SPARTA.sol#925-961)
	- SPARTA.balanceOf(address) (SPARTA.sol#493-497)
	- SPARTA.constructor() (SPARTA.sol#421-457)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SPARTA.sol#803)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SPARTA.sol#979)
	SPARTA._rTotal (SPARTA.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SPARTA._getCurrentSupply() (SPARTA.sol#1129-1141)
	- SPARTA._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SPARTA.sol#977-983)
	- SPARTA.constructor() (SPARTA.sol#421-457)
	- SPARTA.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SPARTA.sol#589-611)
detectors.markdown:

		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](SPARTA.sol#L841)

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](SPARTA.sol#L951)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](SPARTA.sol#L953)
	[SPARTA._rOwned](SPARTA.sol#L323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SPARTA._takeTeam(uint256)](SPARTA.sol#L965-L973)
	- [SPARTA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](SPARTA.sol#L925-L961)
	- [SPARTA.balanceOf(address)](SPARTA.sol#L493-L497)
	- [SPARTA.constructor()](SPARTA.sol#L421-L457)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](SPARTA.sol#L803)

	[SPARTA._rTotal](SPARTA.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
